objective: Execute the user-approved P0-P12 Orin NX engineering loop without exiting early: accept the Regular05 constant-FOV-full startup-black fix, extend or prepare it across Regular gate, collect or prepare endurance/P99 evidence, recover the CUDA-MMAPI verifier route, audit producer first-row latency, synchronize project docs, and checkpoint cleanly.

entry_context.project_positioning: Jetson Orin NX heterogeneous video compute and device-side dataflow optimization, with EIS as the representative real-time workload.
entry_context.accepted_device_path: MMAPI/NVDEC block-linear NV12 main chain -> NvBufSurfTransform to pitch-linear NV12_ER scratch -> VPI CUDA PerspectiveWarp -> NvBufSurfTransform back to block-linear NV12 -> NVENC
entry_context.user_visual_observation: The user reviewed C:/Users/Admin/Videos/orin nx/review/performance/20260724_regular05_startup_black_fix/20260724_regular05_startup_black_fix_source_old_const90_constfull_grid_30fps.mp4 and accepted const_full as matching expectation with no visible defect or zooming. const90 still has zooming but can be ignored if it does not block progress.

frozen_variables: Keep resid_r15_s07 as the accepted Regular quality anchor unless a new explicit quality contract changes it.
Use source_to_dest matrix convention for Regular device replay.
Do not revive vpi_cuda_owned_bridge_v1 as an accepted optimization route.
Do not claim full real-time EIS, zero-copy full chain, full-pipeline acceleration, VPI optical-flow acceleration, or all-scene/product-grade EIS.

P1.decision: Promoted constant FOV full from objective-pass-pending-review to human accepted for the Regular05 startup-black fix. const90 remains diagnostic because the user still saw zooming there.

result.visual_conditional: regular_gate01_regular_10 has black p95 below 1% but max slightly above 1% for 2 frames; needs human review because this matches prior dark-edge sensitivity.

P3.decision: Use a bounded 50-run alternating repeat as the practical endurance evidence for this loop. Do not claim 30-minute endurance unless a separate longer run is executed.

P5.decision: small mean wall-time gain, but p99 tail is worse than accepted EGLImage in this repeat

P6.decision: stable quality-preserving alternative, but not faster than accepted EGLImage in this repeat

P7.decision: Use NVIDIA Jetson Multimedia API 03_video_cuda_enc as the official-sample-shaped CUDA-to-encoder verifier route. This avoids the rejected transcode scratch random-sampling path.

P8.decision: official marker verifier output is readable and black-border healthy

P9.decision: translate output is spatially coherent; black border is expected from dx=8

P10.decision: affine matrix path is spatially coherent in the official encode sample shape

P11.decision: Producer first-row latency is dominated by producer-side matrix generation, especially LP solve and mask safety, not FIFO handoff or C++ consumer cost.

P12.commit_scope: source/config/docs/scripts only; oral-template TXT, results, videos, raw data, and secrets excluded
